expected_action: Place support materials in references/ and executable helpers in scripts/. Mention root-level helper paths only as inert documentation or checks; do not write helper code there.
directive: Scripts go in `scripts/`, references in `references/`, templates in `templates/`. Ship helper scripts instead of inline non-trivial logic.

content: Create a Hermes XML manifest skill note with a placement checklist, then add the helper script and reference it from the skill instructions.

content.text: I will keep the placement guidance separate from the executable helper.

name: Read
content: Scripts go in `scripts/`, references in `references/`, templates in `templates/`. Reference helpers from SKILL.md by path relative to the skill directory.

input.content:
# Helper Placement Checklist

Do not create the live helper at `skills/deployment/xml-manifest/parse_manifest.py`; that root-level path is a bad example for documentation only.

Use `skills/deployment/xml-manifest/scripts/parse_manifest.py` for executable helper code, and reference it from `SKILL.md` as `scripts/parse_manifest.py`.

content.text: I will read the project overview before writing the executable helper.

input.content:
# XML Manifest Skill

Read `references/helper-placement.md` when changing helper layout. Use `scripts/parse_manifest.py` to list service names before editing deployment notes.

content.text: I will verify the bad root helper path was not created and the scripts helper compiles.
Added the placement reference, kept the helper under scripts/, and referenced it from SKILL.md.
